items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step aims to validate the scenario where a persona attempts to share a template across businesses. However, the evidence provided does not confirm the functionality of sharing the generated link or any mechanisms to ensure that sharing is possible. The linked use case describes the generation of a temporary link but lacks explicit details on the ability to copy and share this link, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
